nodes.name: rvagent-core
nodes.summary: Core agent runtime: messages, models, state, prompt, parallel exec, RVF bridge, session crypto, string pool.

nodes.name: rvagent-mcp
nodes.summary: MCP server/client implementation with stdio and SSE transports, tool registry, resources, middleware.

nodes.name: models.rs
nodes.summary: Model resolution (provider:model strings) and async ChatModel/StreamingChatModel traits.

nodes.name: StreamChunk
nodes.summary: Incremental chunk from a streaming LLM response with optional final usage.

nodes.name: StreamUsage
nodes.summary: Token usage counters (input/output) from streaming responses.

nodes.name: Provider
nodes.summary: Known LLM providers (Anthropic, OpenAi, Google, Bedrock, Fireworks, Other).

nodes.name: ApiKeySource
nodes.summary: Source for API keys: Env var, File path, or None.

nodes.name: ModelConfig
nodes.summary: Resolved model configuration (provider, model_id, key source, max_tokens, temperature).

nodes.name: resolve_model
nodes.summary: Parses 'provider:model' string into a ModelConfig with default API key source.

nodes.name: ChatModel
nodes.summary: Async trait for chat model implementations providing complete() and stream().

nodes.name: StreamingChatModel
nodes.summary: Extends ChatModel with chunk-based incremental streaming.

nodes.name: parallel.rs
nodes.summary: Parallel execution utilities (ADR-103) preserving input ordering across concurrent async tasks.

nodes.name: parallel_execute
nodes.summary: Run async operations concurrently via JoinSet preserving input order.

nodes.name: parallel_execute_limited
nodes.summary: Run async operations concurrently with a Semaphore-bounded concurrency limit.

nodes.name: prompt.rs
nodes.summary: System prompt construction with BASE_AGENT_PROMPT template and builder.

nodes.name: SystemPromptBuilder
nodes.summary: Builder for composing the base agent system prompt with extensions.

nodes.name: rvf_bridge.rs
nodes.summary: RVF witness/manifest/mount bridge types: governance, policy, witness headers, mount table.

nodes.name: RvfMountHandle
nodes.summary: Opaque handle to a mounted RVF capsule.

nodes.name: RvfComponentId
nodes.summary: Identifier for an RVF component.

nodes.name: RvfVerifyStatus
nodes.summary: Verification status enum for RVF components.

nodes.name: WitTypeId
nodes.summary: Witness type identifier wrapper.

nodes.name: TaskOutcome
nodes.summary: Outcome of a task execution (success/failure variants).

nodes.name: GovernanceMode
nodes.summary: Governance mode for RVF execution.

nodes.name: PolicyCheck
nodes.summary: Policy check result enum.

nodes.name: RvfToolCallEntry
nodes.summary: Tool call entry recorded inside an RVF witness.

nodes.name: RvfWitnessHeader
nodes.summary: 64-byte RVF witness header with magic, flags, and offsets.

nodes.name: RvfManifestEntry
nodes.summary: Single manifest entry in an RVF capsule.

nodes.name: RvfManifestEntryType
nodes.summary: Type classification for manifest entries.

nodes.name: RvfManifest
nodes.summary: Full RVF manifest containing entries and metadata.

nodes.name: RvfBridgeConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration for the RVF bridge with default-true flags.

nodes.name: MountTableEntry
nodes.summary: Single entry in the RVF mount table.

nodes.name: MountTable
nodes.summary: Tracks mounted RVF capsules and their handles.

nodes.name: session_crypto.rs
nodes.summary: AES-GCM session encryption: key generation/derivation (SHA3-256) and SessionCrypto helper.

nodes.name: generate_key
nodes.summary: Generate a random 32-byte encryption key via CSPRNG.

nodes.name: derive_key
nodes.summary: Derive a 32-byte key from password+salt using SHA3-256.

nodes.name: SessionCrypto
nodes.summary: AES-GCM encrypt/decrypt wrapper for session data persistence.

nodes.name: CryptoError
nodes.summary: Error variants for session crypto operations.

nodes.name: generate_session_filename
nodes.summary: Generate a unique session filename string.

nodes.name: state.rs
nodes.summary: AgentState: messages, todos, files, skills, type-erased extensions with Cow semantics.

nodes.name: TodoStatus
nodes.summary: Status states for an agent todo item.

nodes.name: TodoItem
nodes.summary: Single todo entry tracked in agent state.

nodes.name: FileData
nodes.summary: File content with encoding metadata maintained in agent state.

nodes.name: SkillMetadata
nodes.summary: Metadata describing a registered agent skill.

nodes.name: AgentState
nodes.summary: Central agent state container holding messages, todos, files, skills, and extensions.

nodes.name: string_pool.rs
nodes.summary: Interned string pool using DashMap for cheap Arc<str> deduplication.

nodes.name: StringPool
nodes.summary: Concurrent interning pool returning Arc<str> for repeated strings.

nodes.name: config_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests for RvAgentConfig defaults, security policy, resource budgets, and serialization.

nodes.name: integration_tests.rs
nodes.summary: End-to-end AgentGraph tests with MockModel, tool executors, parallel calls, and failure paths.

nodes.name: MockModel
nodes.summary: In-test stub ChatModel returning queued responses.

nodes.name: EchoToolExecutor
nodes.summary: Tool executor that echoes its input for tests.

nodes.name: FailingToolExecutor
nodes.summary: Tool executor that always errors for failure-path tests.

nodes.name: message_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Tests for Message variants, ToolCall serialization, AI-with-tool-calls, and ordering.

nodes.name: model_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Tests for resolve_model across Anthropic, OpenAI, custom providers, and invalid strings.

nodes.name: state_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Tests for AgentState clone semantics, defaults, subagent merging, extensions, and todo transitions.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for rvagent-mcp binary crate; depends on rvagent-core, rvagent-tools, rvagent-middleware, axum, clap.

nodes.name: client.rs
nodes.summary: MCP client using a Transport to send JSON-RPC requests/notifications.

nodes.name: McpClient
nodes.summary: MCP protocol client wrapping a pluggable Transport.

nodes.name: groups.rs
nodes.summary: ToolGroup categorization and ToolFilter for include/exclude tool-group selection.

nodes.name: ToolGroup
nodes.summary: Categorical groupings of MCP tools (files, shell, search, etc.).

nodes.name: ToolFilter
nodes.summary: Include/exclude filter over ToolGroup sets for the tool registry.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Public crate entry point: declares modules and re-exports core MCP types and McpError.

nodes.name: McpError
nodes.summary: Top-level MCP error variants implementing std::error::Error via thiserror.

nodes.name: main.rs
nodes.summary: rvagent-mcp binary entrypoint: clap CLI selecting stdio or SSE transport, axum SSE server.

nodes.name: Cli
nodes.summary: clap-derived CLI arguments for the MCP server binary.

nodes.name: AppState
nodes.summary: Shared axum application state for SSE transport.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Tokio main: parses CLI, builds registry, dispatches to stdio or SSE runner.

nodes.name: build_tool_registry
nodes.summary: Build the McpToolRegistry applying the ToolFilter selection.

nodes.name: run_stdio
nodes.summary: Run MCP server over stdio JSON-RPC transport.

nodes.name: run_sse
nodes.summary: Run MCP server over HTTP+SSE using axum and tower-http CORS.

nodes.name: SseStream
nodes.summary: Stream adapter converting broadcast messages into SSE events.

nodes.name: sse_handler
nodes.summary: Axum handler producing the SSE response stream.

nodes.name: message_handler
nodes.summary: Axum POST handler that ingests client JSON-RPC messages.

nodes.name: health_handler
nodes.summary: Axum GET /health endpoint returning server liveness JSON.

nodes.name: middleware.rs
nodes.summary: MCP middleware abstraction with logging, rate limiting, and a pipeline composer.

nodes.name: McpMiddleware
nodes.summary: Async trait middlewares implement to observe/modify MCP requests/responses.

nodes.name: LoggingMiddleware
nodes.summary: Middleware logging each MCP request/response via tracing.

nodes.name: RateLimitMiddleware
nodes.summary: Token-bucket-like rate limiter for MCP requests.

nodes.name: McpMiddlewarePipeline
nodes.summary: Composes an ordered list of McpMiddleware implementations.

nodes.name: protocol.rs
nodes.summary: JSON-RPC and MCP protocol types: requests, responses, initialize, tools, resources, prompts.

nodes.name: JsonRpcRequest
nodes.summary: JSON-RPC 2.0 request envelope.

nodes.name: JsonRpcResponse
nodes.summary: JSON-RPC 2.0 response envelope.

nodes.name: JsonRpcError
nodes.summary: JSON-RPC 2.0 error object with code/message/data.

nodes.name: McpMethod
nodes.summary: Enumeration of MCP method names (initialize, tools/list, tools/call, etc.).

nodes.name: ServerCapabilities
nodes.summary: Capabilities advertised by an MCP server during initialize.

nodes.name: ToolsCapability
nodes.summary: Tools-capability advertisement section.

nodes.name: ResourcesCapability
nodes.summary: Resources-capability advertisement section.

nodes.name: PromptsCapability
nodes.summary: Prompts-capability advertisement section.

nodes.name: ClientCapabilities
nodes.summary: Client-side capabilities advertised during initialize.

nodes.name: RootsCapability
nodes.summary: Roots-capability section for client.

nodes.name: InitializeParams
nodes.summary: Parameters for the MCP initialize call.

nodes.name: ClientInfo
nodes.summary: Client name/version identifying handshake info.

nodes.name: InitializeResult
nodes.summary: Server response to initialize containing capabilities.

nodes.name: ServerInfo
nodes.summary: Server name/version metadata returned in initialize.

nodes.name: McpTool
nodes.summary: Tool descriptor (name, description, JSON schema) advertised over MCP.

nodes.name: ToolCallParams
nodes.summary: Parameters for tools/call: tool name and arguments.

nodes.name: ToolCallResult
nodes.summary: Result returned by an MCP tool call.

nodes.name: McpResource
nodes.summary: Resource descriptor exposed by an MCP server.

nodes.name: McpResourceTemplate
nodes.summary: Template-based resource descriptor with URI substitutions.

nodes.name: ResourceReadParams
nodes.summary: Parameters for resources/read.

nodes.name: ResourceReadResult
nodes.summary: Result returned by resources/read.

nodes.name: ResourceContent
nodes.summary: Content payload for a returned resource (text or blob).

nodes.name: McpPrompt
nodes.summary: Prompt descriptor exposed by an MCP server.

nodes.name: PromptArgument
nodes.summary: Argument descriptor for a prompt.

nodes.name: PromptGetParams
nodes.summary: Parameters for prompts/get.

nodes.name: registry.rs
nodes.summary: Tool registry: handler trait, definition struct, and built-in ping/echo/list-capabilities handlers.

nodes.name: McpToolHandler
nodes.summary: Async trait implemented by MCP tool handlers.

nodes.name: McpToolDefinition
nodes.summary: Pairs tool metadata with its handler implementation.

nodes.name: McpToolRegistry
nodes.summary: DashMap-backed registry of tool name to McpToolDefinition.

nodes.name: PingHandler
nodes.summary: Built-in ping tool handler.

nodes.name: EchoHandler
nodes.summary: Built-in echo tool handler.

nodes.name: ListCapabilitiesHandler
nodes.summary: Built-in tool that returns server capabilities JSON.

nodes.name: register_builtins
nodes.summary: Register built-in ping/echo/list-capabilities handlers on a registry.

nodes.name: resources.rs
nodes.summary: Resource provider abstraction with Static, File, and Template implementations and a registry.

nodes.name: ResourceUri
nodes.summary: Typed wrapper around a resource URI string.

nodes.name: ResourceProvider
nodes.summary: Async trait for providing MCP resource listings and reads.

nodes.name: StaticResourceProvider
nodes.summary: Provider serving in-memory static resources.

nodes.name: FileResourceProvider
nodes.summary: Provider serving filesystem-backed resources.

nodes.name: TemplateResourceProvider
nodes.summary: Provider that resolves templated URIs via a TemplateResolver.

nodes.name: TemplateResolver
nodes.summary: Async trait for resolving template URI parameters into content.

nodes.name: ResourceRegistry
nodes.summary: Aggregates multiple ResourceProvider implementations for unified lookup.

nodes.name: server.rs
nodes.summary: McpServer implementation dispatching JSON-RPC methods against tool and resource registries.

nodes.name: McpServerConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration for the MCP server (e.g., max concurrent requests).

nodes.name: McpServer
nodes.summary: Stateless MCP request dispatcher composed of tool/resource registries and config.
